chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.S-298 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For haring of main case 20.11.2025 None present for petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General a/w Insp Imtiaz Ali Khawar SHO PS Daras, Insp. Muhammad Akram SHO PS Sadhoja and ASI Sadam of PS Moro ************** None present for the petitioners, nor any intimation received. Similar was the position on the last date of hearing. Record reflects that through present petition, the petitioners have approached this Court seeking protection against alleged harassment at the hands of the official respondents, purportedly at the instance of private respondents No. 9 to 13. The official respondents have filed their respective statements /comments, which are taken on record. They deny the allegations leveled against them and submit that they have neither subjected the petitioners to any undue harassment nor intend to do so in the future. In view of the above statements, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of. However, the official respondents are directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioners and to provide protection in accordance with law as and when they approach. This order shall not affect any inquiry, investigation, or trial already pending against the petitioners before any competent forum. J U D G E M. Ali*
